RichText.Text: 1. admire the natural beauty 2. reflect on the remarkable changes 3. the funny behaviour of the lamb 4. inspire her to write a hit children's book 5. celebrate her fortieth birthday twenty-twentieth thirty-thirtieth...... 6. live out the dream live up to one's expectations beyond one's wildest expectations 7. on/upon one's arrival 8. keep sb. company he needs company 9. note down the delightful moment 10. turn those ideas into a book 11. go down so well 12. As word got around about her willingness to take in animals, the small farm became home to goats and chickens.

1. 欣赏自然风光 2. 反思显著的变化 3. 小羊滑稽的行为 4. 促使她写出一本畅销儿童读物 5. 庆祝她的四十岁生日 （整数，改ty为tieth为序数词） 6. 实现梦想； 不辜负众人期望； 出乎/超出所有人意料 7. 某人一抵达/到达 8. 陪伴某人； 他需要人陪伴 9. 记下这欢乐的瞬间 10. 将那些想法编撰成书 11. 大受欢迎；反响极佳 12. 消息传开，大家得知她愿意收留小动物，这座小农场便成了山羊和小鸡的家园。
